description: An editor's judgment about another BKK record (annotation, comment, or translation). Carries two independent axes — workflow `state` and quality `rating` — so every editorial pass is a complete snapshot. Resolution: latest record (by `createdAt`) from any DID in the `[annotations].dids` allowlist wins per target uri; `target.cid` is informational and a judgment carries forward across record edits. Authors may rate but not change state on their own records; `bkk-admin` DIDs (configured server-side) bypass that restriction.

target.description: The record being curated. Resolver keys on `uri` only; `cid` is informational.

state.description: Workflow state. Open enum to match other BKK lexicons.

rating.description: Quality rating. 0 is the default and means unrated/baseline.

supersedes.description: CID of a prior curation judgment this one replaces.

strongRef.description: AT-Protocol strong reference (uri + cid) to another record.
